texto: white middle-upper class guys in highly educated families have a unique burden placed on us to be the hero of every story that we tell. I don’t think it’s merely that we’re self-centered and arrogant, but that we feel like we’re supposed to be in charge, and if we’re not the hero of the story, we’ve somehow failed in our life duty.group
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Morgan Guyton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “white middle-upper class guys in highly educated families have a unique burden placed on us to be…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, ego, self-centeredness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de self-centeredness.
